mapper.insert: insert into wallet_txn(txn_id, request_id, txn_type, biz_type, biz_id, status, amount, remark) values(#{txnId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{requestId}, #{txnType}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update wallet_txn set status = 'SUCCEEDED', update_time = current_timestamp where txn_id = #{txnId, jdbcType=BINARY}
